pending.body:
finding_summary: The late-health-check fix is still missing from the remaining claim/propose flush paths, so a conflict or missing `.beads/issues.jsonl` introduced after the precheck can still be flushed. In `src/cli/project.rs:968-975`, recovered claim replay still uses `sync_if_dirty()` instead of the new locked health-gated helper, and `src/cli/project.rs:1007-1008` plus `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:3081-3086`, `3162-3169`, and `3283-3286` still do an unlocked `check_beads_health(...)` precheck before calling raw `sync_flush()`. If the export becomes unsafe after that probe but before the sync acquires `.beads/.br-sync.lock`, these paths will still publish the local mutation, which reopens the same TOCTOU hole the new `sync_if_dirty_when_beads_healthy()` code was added to close.
severity: medium
affected_files:
- src/cli/project.rs
- src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs
remediation_hint: Route these flushes through a lock-held health-gated helper (`sync_if_dirty_when_beads_healthy(base_dir)` or a dedicated `sync_flush_when_beads_healthy(base_dir)`), and add a regression test where `.beads/issues.jsonl` becomes unsafe after the precheck but before the flush starts.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 18 -> Plan and Implement
